benchmark.label: Square lattice patch 3x3
notes: Regular square patch with unit nearest-neighbor spacing.

case_summary.audit_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/run_audit_conventions.py --conformance-dir artifacts --output-dir artifacts/audit --case-id square_patch_3x3__floating__p3__h2__full

classification_rows.audit_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/run_audit_conventions.py --conformance-dir artifacts --output-dir artifacts/audit --case-id square_patch_3x3__floating__p3__h2__full
classification_rows.label: Square lattice patch 3x3
classification_rows.notes: The floating rerun adds endpoint drift on top of the same convention mismatch that persists after exact quantization.

classification_rows.audit_case_command: PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/run_audit_conventions.py --conformance-dir artifacts --output-dir artifacts/audit --case-id square_patch_3x3__floating__p3__h2__full
classification_rows.label: Square lattice patch 3x3
classification_rows.notes: The disagreement is entirely unmatched zero-length bars, which only GUDHI reports.

commands.case_audit: PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/run_audit_conventions.py --conformance-dir artifacts --output-dir artifacts/audit --case-id square_patch_3x3__floating__p3__h2__full

alternate_coeff.description: Baseline matrix rerun with the alternate coefficient field.

alternate_coeff_exact.description: Alternate coefficient rerun on the exact-mode control input.

baseline.description: Fresh rerun on the saved input matrix and original threshold.

exact_mode.description: Exact quantization control rerun on the saved quantized counterpart matrix.

jitter.description: Deterministic symmetric epsilon jitter on the saved input matrix.

scale_double.description: Baseline matrix rerun at twice the original threshold.

scale_half.description: Baseline matrix rerun at half the original threshold.
